tasks.title: Create effort.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/engine/effort.ts. effort engine — story extraction, role bracketing, hour computation, report generation. Tests: src/engine/effort.test.ts

tasks.title: Create spec-parser.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/engine/spec-parser.ts. markdown parser that extracts US-### blocks with SP values and role assignments from spec.md. Tests: src/engine/spec-parser.test.ts

tasks.title: Create types.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/engine/types.ts. shared TypeScript interfaces for EffortReport, RoleBreakdown, StoryEstimate, CompressionReport, DeliveryActuals, CompressionRatios, CompressionSummary, LeadingIndicators

tasks.title: Create roles.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/engine/roles.ts. canonical role multiplier defaults — RE=6, TS=4, PM=2, PE=1.5, DE=5 — and config override resolution

tasks.title: Create report-writer.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/engine/report-writer.ts. generates effort markdown report to `docs/assessments/effort-<feature>-YYYY-MM-DD.md`

tasks.title: Create compression.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/engine/compression.ts. compression engine — ratio computation, leading indicators, summary generation, SQLite persistence. Tests: src/engine/compression.test.ts

tasks.title: Create git-timestamps.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/engine/git-timestamps.ts. extracts spec creation date, first/last impl commit, PR merge time from Git log and `gh` CLI. Tests: src/engine/git-timestamps.test.ts

tasks.title: Create commit-cluster.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/engine/commit-cluster.ts. clusters commits by gap threshold, computes active coding time. Tests: src/engine/commit-cluster.test.ts

tasks.title: Create compression.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/db/compression.ts. SQLite adapters for `compression` table — insert, query, aggregate. Tests: src/engine/compression.test.ts

tasks.title: Create effort.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/commands/effort.ts. Commander command — loads config, calls effort engine, writes report. Tests: src/commands/effort.test.ts

tasks.title: Create compression.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/commands/compression.ts. Commander command — calls compression engine, formats output, persistence. Tests: src/commands/compression.test.ts

tasks.title: Modify cli.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY src/cli.ts. register `measure effort` and `measure compression` subcommands

tasks.title: Modify config.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY src/utils/config.ts. extend `GwrkConfigSchema` with `effort.roles` and `compression.sessionGapMinutes`. Tests: src/utils/config.test.ts

tasks.title: Create effort-defaults.ts
tasks.description:
NEW src/engine/effort-defaults.ts. compiled-in profile-keyed rates — TS=50, Rust=35, Python=65, DE=25. Tests: src/engine/effort-defaults.test.ts

REVIEW FAIL (code): lint/style/noNonNullAssertion — FR-017.
  WHERE: src/engine/effort-defaults.ts:17, 18
  EXPECTED: Code without non-null assertions (!).
  ACTUAL: return DEFAULT_LOC_RATES.TS!;
  FIX: Use a safe default or type casting if guaranteed, e.g., DEFAULT_LOC_RATES["TS"] ?? 50.

tasks.title: Modify compression.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY src/engine/compression.ts. add `computeForecastFromLOC` deriving SP from git numstat and spec/plan/research LOC. Tests: src/engine/compression.test.ts

tasks.title: Modify config.ts
tasks.description:
MODIFY src/utils/config.ts. formal effort section in `GwrkConfigSchema`, add `resolveEffortConfig` three-layer chain. Tests: src/utils/config.test.ts

REVIEW FAIL (code): lint/style/noNonNullAssertion — FR-019.
  WHERE: src/utils/config.ts:224, 228, 239
  EXPECTED: Code without non-null assertions (!).
  ACTUAL: locRate = config.effort.locRates[profile]!;
  FIX: Use a safe access or conditional check.

tasks.title: Modify harvest.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY src/engine/harvest.ts. wire LOC fallback into `harvestFeature` when plan has no SP

tasks.title: Modify compression.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY src/engine/compression.ts. include define-run elapsed from DB `runs` table in actuals. Tests: src/commands/compression.test.ts

tasks.title: Modify compression.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY src/commands/compression.ts. surface both Point and Full compression in CLI text and JSON output. Tests: src/commands/compression.test.ts
